commit.subject: LU-12949 obdclass: run recovery-small test_138 on branch 2_12
commit.message:
LU-12949 obdclass: run recovery-small test_138 on branch 2_12

This is to check if an error seen locally is
related to the one that was addressed in this ticket.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly=true testlist=recovery-small
Signed-off-by: Gian-Carlo DeFazio <defazio1@llnl.gov>
Change-Id: Id81c7ab0c7e7e0cda5d16c2a434cbae6e528f33f
